fields.name: VAT Report No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT report that the VAT report line is related to.

This field is used internally.


Your implementation may differ.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the VAT report line.

This field is used internally.


Your implementation may differ.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the document that resulted in the VAT entry.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number that resulted in the VAT entry.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the document that resulted in the VAT entry.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the VAT entry.

fields.name: Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that the VAT amount in the Amount is calculated from.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT amount for the report line. This is calculated based on the value of the Base field.

fields.name: VAT Calculation Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how VAT will be calculated for purchases or sales of items with this particular combination of VAT business posting group and VAT product posting group.

fields.name: Bill-to/Pay-to No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the bill-to customer or pay-to vendor that the entry is linked to.

fields.name: EU 3-Party Trade
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the transaction is related to trade with a third party within the EU.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Internal Ref. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the internal reference number of the VAT entry.

fields.name: Unrealized Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unrealized VAT amount for this line if you use unrealized VAT.

fields.name: Unrealized Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unrealized base amount if you use unrealized VAT.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved customer or vendor to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved item or resource to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT registration number of the customer or vendor that the VAT entry is linked to.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies which general business posting group was used when the VAT entry was posted.
The value of this field is copied from the corresponding field in the VAT Entry table.

Your implementation may differ.

fields.name: Record Identifier
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the location of this line in the printed or exported VAT report.

This field is used internally.


Your implementation may differ.


Additional Information

The tax authorities require specific data in specific locations in the file when you submit VAT reports in print or electronically. The Record Identifier field specifies where in the VAT report the data from this line must display. For example, if the tax authorities identify the header record as starting with 0, the Record Identifier may be set to R0 for the VAT report line that contains the header record.
